passives.name: Limitless as the Stars
passives.effects: Increase your {{as|'''total''' magic resistance}} by {{as|20%|mr}}. Additionally, reduce all incoming damage received from non-basic attack sources by 5% per {{as|200 '''total''' magic resistance}}, up to a maximum of 50% damage reduction.

effects_structured.raw: Increase your {{as '''total''' magic resistance}} by {{as 20% mr}}
Additionally, reduce all incoming damage received from non-basic attack sources by 5% per {{as 200 '''total''' magic resistance}}, up to a maximum of 50% damage reduction.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model review: passive applies continuously, increasing total magic resistance and reducing only non-basic-attack incoming damage.
Formula validation: non-basic damage reduction scales at 5% per 200 total magic resistance with a hard maximum of 50%.

Availability/economy note: this distributed item is Arena-scoped and acquired through distributed systems (for example anvils, augments, or round rewards) rather than standard shop purchase; Tier-1 datasets expose reconciliation economy values (total 1000 / sell 400).
